scripts.up:full: docker compose -f docker-compose.yml -f docker-compose.data.yml --profile ingest --profile observability up -d
scripts.up:ingest: docker compose -f docker-compose.yml -f docker-compose.data.yml --profile ingest up -d
scripts.up:observability: docker compose -f docker-compose.yml -f docker-compose.data.yml --profile observability up -d
scripts.up:truenas: docker compose -f docker-compose.yml -f docker-compose.truenas-data.yml -f docker-compose.truenas.yml up -d --build
scripts.up:truenas:full: docker compose -f docker-compose.yml -f docker-compose.truenas-data.yml -f docker-compose.truenas.yml --profile ingest up -d --build
scripts.dev:reset: docker compose -f docker-compose.yml -f docker-compose.data.yml down -v && docker compose -f docker-compose.yml -f docker-compose.data.yml up -d
scripts.down:truenas: docker compose -f docker-compose.yml -f docker-compose.truenas-data.yml -f docker-compose.truenas.yml down
scripts.logs:truenas: docker compose -f docker-compose.yml -f docker-compose.truenas-data.yml -f docker-compose.truenas.yml logs -f --tail=100
scripts.smoke: docker compose -f docker-compose.yml -f docker-compose.data.yml --profile test run --rm smoke
scripts.ingest:pubmed: docker compose -f docker-compose.yml -f docker-compose.data.yml --profile ingest run --rm ingester-pubmed
scripts.ingest:trials: docker compose -f docker-compose.yml -f docker-compose.data.yml --profile ingest run --rm ingester-trials
scripts.ingest:fda: docker compose -f docker-compose.yml -f docker-compose.data.yml --profile ingest run --rm ingester-fda
scripts.ingest:preprint: docker compose -f docker-compose.yml -f docker-compose.data.yml --profile ingest run --rm ingester-preprint
scripts.ingest:openalex: docker compose -f docker-compose.yml -f docker-compose.data.yml --profile ingest run --rm ingester-openalex
scripts.ingest:crossref: docker compose -f docker-compose.yml -f docker-compose.data.yml --profile ingest run --rm ingester-crossref
scripts.ingest:nih-reporter: docker compose -f docker-compose.yml -f docker-compose.data.yml --profile ingest run --rm ingester-nih-reporter
scripts.ingest:chembl: docker compose -f docker-compose.yml -f docker-compose.data.yml --profile ingest run --rm ingester-chembl
scripts.ingest:nsf: docker compose -f docker-compose.yml -f docker-compose.data.yml --profile ingest run --rm ingester-nsf
scripts.ingest:hpo: docker compose -f docker-compose.yml -f docker-compose.data.yml --profile ingest run --rm ingester-hpo
scripts.ingest:europepmc: docker compose -f docker-compose.yml -f docker-compose.data.yml --profile ingest run --rm ingester-europepmc
scripts.ingest:core: docker compose -f docker-compose.yml -f docker-compose.data.yml --profile ingest run --rm ingester-core
scripts.ingest:unpaywall: docker compose -f docker-compose.yml -f docker-compose.data.yml --profile ingest run --rm ingester-unpaywall
scripts.ingest:semanticscholar: docker compose -f docker-compose.yml -f docker-compose.data.yml --profile ingest run --rm ingester-semanticscholar
scripts.ingest:clinvar: docker compose -f docker-compose.yml -f docker-compose.data.yml --profile ingest run --rm ingester-clinvar
